summary: Reviewed research comparison — weak sources already properly labeled

summary: Reviewed research comparison — weak source already properly labeled
reason: Delaware.pro partner blog is marked as weak_signal with low confidence and includes explicit guidance to verify against official SAP release notes. Remaining sources are SAP MDG FAQ (official) and Neo4j blog (official). No changes needed.

summary: Reviewed research watchlist — weak sources already properly labeled
reason: CAIS newsletter and Juejin industry report are explicitly marked as weak_signal with low confidence. Evidence table clearly labels aggregated survey data as low confidence. Stronger sources (SAP official blog, KTern.AI, VentureBeat) are appropriately rated. No changes needed.
